results.title: Valve’s Steam Machine Gets a Makeover Into a Portal Fan’s Dream Console
results.description: ETA Prime modifies the Steam Machine, a high-performance gaming console, by turning it into a Weighted Companion Cube inspired by the Portal series. This project features a dbrand Weighted Companion Cube case made from polycarbonate with rubber rails and a magnetic front panel, paired with customizable LED lighting and a Portal-themed controller skin. The case [...] The post Valve’s Steam Machine Gets a Makeover Into a Portal Fan’s Dream Console appeared first on Geeky Gadgets .
